data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Implementation complete. scan-config-keys.sh created (Python-based, portable, no macOS sed issues). All acceptance checks pass: executable, test GREEN (5/5), RED marker absent from .test-index, script exits 0 on real repo, ruff passes. .test-index staged with only the [test_scan_config_keys_gap_list] marker removed. Ready for commit.
